# Requirements Quality Checklist: Course Offering Administration

**Purpose**: Validate that course offering administration requirements are complete, clear, consistent, measurable, and scenario-complete before implementation/review.
**Created**: 2026-03-09
**Feature**: [/home/m_srnic/ece493/group_project/ECE493Group19/specs/001-manage-course-offerings/spec.md](/home/m_srnic/ece493/group_project/ECE493Group19/specs/001-manage-course-offerings/spec.md)

**Note**: This checklist is generated by the `/speckit.checklist` command based on feature context and requirements.

## Requirement Completeness

- [ ] CHK001 Are authorization requirements explicit for who can access the administration view and who can perform add/delete actions? [Completeness, Spec §FR-001, Spec §FR-002]
- [ ] CHK002 Are all required offering input fields and constraints fully enumerated (term, instructor, capacity, schedule, section, course) rather than partially implied? [Completeness, Spec §FR-003, Spec §FR-015]
- [ ] CHK003 Are requirements defined for both standard deletion and override deletion paths, including prerequisites and outcomes? [Completeness, Spec §FR-007, Spec §FR-018, Spec §FR-019]
- [ ] CHK004 Are failure-handling requirements present for both catalog-write failure and audit-write failure outcomes? [Completeness, Spec §FR-012, Spec §FR-013, Spec §FR-016]

## Requirement Clarity

- [ ] CHK005 Is “authorized administrator” defined with unambiguous role/permission criteria to avoid interpretation drift? [Clarity, Ambiguity, Spec §FR-001]
- [ ] CHK006 Is “approved exception workflow defined by policy” specified with concrete entry/exit conditions in this feature scope? [Clarity, Ambiguity, Spec §FR-007, Spec §Assumptions]
- [ ] CHK007 Is “schedule validity” quantified with explicit validation rules (time format, overlap boundaries, timezone assumptions)? [Clarity, Gap, Spec §FR-003]
- [ ] CHK008 Is “unreasonably high capacity” replaced with explicit numeric bounds or policy references? [Clarity, Ambiguity, Spec §Edge Cases]

## Requirement Consistency

- [ ] CHK009 Are deletion constraints consistent between blocked deletion language and immediate override deletion allowance? [Consistency, Spec §FR-007, Spec §FR-018]
- [ ] CHK010 Are audit requirements consistent between mandatory log fields and queued retry behavior after audit failure? [Consistency, Spec §FR-011, Spec §FR-016]
- [ ] CHK011 Are uniqueness requirements aligned across functional requirements and edge-case language for duplicate offerings? [Consistency, Spec §FR-015, Spec §Edge Cases]

## Acceptance Criteria Quality

- [ ] CHK012 Do acceptance scenarios define objective pass/fail conditions for error feedback quality rather than subjective terms? [Acceptance Criteria, Measurability, Spec §User Story 1 Scenario 2]
- [ ] CHK013 Are success criteria thresholds mapped to concrete measurement windows, data sources, and calculation methods? [Acceptance Criteria, Clarity, Spec §SC-001, Spec §SC-003, Spec §SC-005]
- [ ] CHK014 Is SC-002 worded to avoid conflict with the override-deletion requirement and explicitly scope “direct removal” vs override removal? [Acceptance Criteria, Conflict, Spec §SC-002, Spec §FR-018]
- [ ] CHK015 Is SC-005’s 99% audit-log target reconciled with FR-011 wording that implies unconditional audit logging on completion? [Acceptance Criteria, Conflict, Spec §SC-005, Spec §FR-011]

## Scenario Coverage

- [ ] CHK016 Are primary-flow requirements complete for add and delete from initiation through confirmation and final persisted outcome? [Coverage, Spec §User Story 1, Spec §User Story 2]
- [ ] CHK017 Are alternate-flow requirements complete for invalid input correction and cancellation paths with explicit state expectations? [Coverage, Spec §FR-004, Spec §FR-010]
- [ ] CHK018 Are exception-flow requirements complete for system errors, rollback guarantees, and administrator-facing failure messaging? [Coverage, Exception Flow, Spec §FR-012, Spec §FR-013]
- [ ] CHK019 Are recovery-flow requirements defined after deferred audit retries fail repeatedly (retry limits, escalation, eventual disposition)? [Coverage, Recovery, Gap, Spec §FR-016]
- [ ] CHK020 Are concurrent-administrator scenarios defined with deterministic resolution rules for conflicting updates/deletes? [Coverage, Gap, Spec §Edge Cases]

## Edge Case Coverage

- [ ] CHK021 Are boundary requirements explicit for zero/negative/max capacity and whether bounds vary by course or term? [Edge Case, Clarity, Spec §Edge Cases]
- [ ] CHK022 Are late-state-change requirements complete for data re-check timing and conflict message content requirements? [Edge Case, Completeness, Spec §FR-017]
- [ ] CHK023 Are requirements defined for behavior when enrollment status cannot be determined at delete confirmation time? [Edge Case, Gap]

## Non-Functional Requirements

- [ ] CHK024 Are performance requirements defined for delete and override-delete operations in addition to add operations? [Non-Functional, Gap, Spec §SC-001]
- [ ] CHK025 Are reliability requirements specified for retry queue durability, ordering, and crash recovery guarantees? [Non-Functional, Gap, Spec §FR-016]
- [ ] CHK026 Are security/privacy requirements defined for override reason handling and audit data access controls? [Non-Functional, Security, Gap, Spec §FR-019]

## Dependencies & Assumptions

- [ ] CHK027 Are dependencies on policy definitions, enrollment state semantics, and external use-case artifacts documented with ownership and version references? [Dependencies, Assumption, Spec §FR-014, Spec §Assumptions]
- [ ] CHK028 Is the assumption “any administrator can perform override deletion” validated against governance/compliance expectations? [Assumption, Spec §Clarifications, Spec §Assumptions]

## Ambiguities & Conflicts

- [ ] CHK029 Are potentially ambiguous terms (“active”, “outcome”, “clear feedback”, “normal operating conditions”) defined with measurable criteria? [Ambiguity, Spec §FR-011, Spec §SC-001, Spec §SC-003]
- [ ] CHK030 Is there an explicit traceability scheme linking each FR and SC to at least one acceptance artifact reference for review readiness? [Traceability, Gap, Spec §FR-014]

## Notes

- Check items off as completed: `[x]`
- Add comments or findings inline
- Link to relevant resources or documentation
- Items are numbered sequentially for easy reference
